docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,589.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEON, MONICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-04-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $120.00 SERVED FEB-07-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEON, MONICA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANGELA COOPER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-04-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-04-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE (ANGELA COOPER) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MONICA LEON IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-04-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEON, MONICA $2,709.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,829.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEON, MONICA
